---
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: 
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
    number_sections: yes
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo=TRUE, 
  include=TRUE, 
  warning=FALSE, 
  message=FALSE, 
  results="asis"
)
```

```{r}
source('MOFA_functions.R')

library(data.table)

myoptions_df=fread('fileList1.txt', header=F)
myoptions=split(myoptions_df$V1, myoptions_df$V2)

outFile=myoptions$task_name
user_email=myoptions$email
```

---
title: "MOFA - `r outFile`"
author: `r user_email`
---

```{r}
data_file_df=fread('fileList2.txt', header=F)
data_file_map=split(data_file_df$V1, data_file_df$V2)

def_df=fread('fileList3.txt', header=F)
mod_names=unique(def_df$V3)

get_cat_value = function(def_df, mod_name, cat_name){
  res = def_df |> 
    dplyr::filter(V3 == mod_name & V2 == cat_name) |> 
    dplyr::pull(V1)
  if(length(res) == 0){
    stop(paste0("No value found for module '", mod_name, "' and category '", cat_name, "' in fileList3.txt"))
  }
  if(length(res) > 1){
    stop(paste0("Multiple values found for module '", mod_name, "' and category '", cat_name, "' in fileList3.txt: ", paste(res, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  return(res)
}

mod_files=unlist(lapply(mod_names, function(mod_name) {
  if(!mod_name %in% names(data_file_map)){
    stop(paste0("No file found for module '", mod_name, "' in fileList2.txt"))
  }
  return(data_file_map[[mod_name]])
}))

mod_object_names=unlist(lapply(mod_names, function(mod_name) get_cat_value(def_df, mod_name, "ObjectName")))
mod_md5sums=unlist(lapply(mod_names, function(mod_name) get_cat_value(def_df, mod_name, "md5sum")))

feature_name_cols=unlist(lapply(mod_names, function(mod_name) get_cat_value(def_df, mod_name, "FeatureColumn")))
sample_name_cols=unlist(lapply(mod_names, function(mod_name) get_cat_value(def_df, mod_name, "SampleColumn")))
value_name_cols=unlist(lapply(mod_names, function(mod_name) get_cat_value(def_df, mod_name, "ValueColumn")))
```

# MD5 sum check

```{r}
md5_tab = data.frame(
  Module = mod_names,
  File = mod_files,
  Expected_md5sum = mod_md5sums,
  Actual_md5sum = sapply(mod_files, tools::md5sum)
)
md5_tab$Match = md5_tab$Expected_md5sum == md5_tab$Actual_md5sum
rownames(md5_tab) = NULL

md5_tab %>% 
  kable(booktabs = T) %>%
  kable_styling() %>%
  row_spec(which(md5_tab$`Match` == FALSE), bold = T, color = "white", background = "red")

if(any(md5_tab$`Match` == FALSE)){
  cat("\n<mark>Warning: Highlighted files have mismatched MD5 sums.</mark>\n")
}
```

# Create MOFA object and run MOFA

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results="hide"}
load_rdata_env = function(path) {
  env = new.env(parent = baseenv())
  load(path, envir = env)
  env
}

require_object = function(mod_file, object_name, sample_id_col, feature_name_col, value_col) {
  if(grepl("\\.RData$", mod_file, ignore.case = TRUE)){
    env = load_rdata_env(mod_file)

    if (!exists(object_name, envir = env, inherits = FALSE)) {
      stop("Expected object '", object_name, "' in ", mod_file, call. = FALSE)
    }

    df = as.data.frame(get(object_name, envir = env, inherits = FALSE))
  } else if(grepl("\\.rds$", mod_file, ignore.case = TRUE)){ 
    df = readRDS(mod_file)
  } else {
    stop(paste0("Unsupported file type for '", mod_file, "'. Only .RData and .rds files are supported."), call. = FALSE)
  }

  if(any(!c(sample_id_col, feature_name_col, value_col) %in% colnames(df))){
    missed_cols = setdiff(c(sample_id_col, feature_name_col, value_col), colnames(df))
    stop(
      paste("Missed columns '", paste(missed_cols, collapse = ", "), "' in object '", object_name, "' in ", mod_file, " with colnames: ", paste(colnames(df), collapse = ", "), sep = ""),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  df = df[, c(sample_id_col, feature_name_col, value_col), drop = FALSE] 
  return(df)
}

named_list_of_dfs = lapply(1:length(mod_names), function(i) {
  as.data.frame(require_object(mod_files[i], mod_object_names[i], sample_name_cols[i], feature_name_cols[i], value_name_cols[i]))
})
names(named_list_of_dfs) = mod_names

mofa_obj = create_mofa_object_long(
  named_list_of_dfs = named_list_of_dfs,
  feature_name_cols = feature_name_cols,
  sample_name_cols = sample_name_cols,
  value_name_cols = value_name_cols
)

data_opts = get_default_data_options(mofa_obj)
model_opts = get_default_model_options(mofa_obj)
train_opts = get_default_training_options(mofa_obj)
train_opts$stochastic = FALSE

mofa_obj = prepare_mofa(
  object = mofa_obj,
  data_options = data_opts,
  model_options = model_opts,
  training_options = train_opts
)

output_hdf5=paste0(outFile, ".MOFA_model.hdf5")
trained_model = run_mofa(mofa_obj, output_hdf5, use_basilisk = FALSE)

output_md5=tools::md5sum(output_hdf5)
writeLines(output_md5, paste0(output_hdf5, ".md5"))
```

MOFA model written to: `r output_hdf5`.

# Factor values for each sample

```{r}
mofa_factors = as.data.frame(get_factors(trained_model)$single_group)
factors_file = paste0(outFile, ".MOFA_Factor_Values.csv")
write.csv(mofa_factors, factors_file, row.names = TRUE)

factors_md5 = tools::md5sum(factors_file)
writeLines(factors_md5, paste0(factors_file, ".md5"))

mofa_factors %>% 
  kable(booktabs = T) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

# Inter-factor correlations

This is showing how well each factor correlates with each other factor.

```{r}
corr_png = paste0(outFile, ".MOFA_Factor_Correlations.png")
png(corr_png, width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", res = 300)
plot_factor_cor(trained_model)
ignored=dev.off()
include_graphics(corr_png)
```

# Variance explained by each -omics data per Factor

```{r}
var_explained_factor_png = paste0(outFile, ".MOFA_Variance_Explained_Factor.png")
png(var_explained_factor_png, width = 4, height = 4, units = "in", res = 300)
plot_variance_explained(trained_model, max_r2=15)
ignored=dev.off()
include_graphics(var_explained_factor_png)
```

# Total variance explained by each -omics data

```{r}
var_explained_all_png = paste0(outFile, ".MOFA_Variance_Explained_All.png")
png(var_explained_all_png, width = 4, height = 3, units = "in", res = 300)  
plot_variance_explained(trained_model, plot_total = T)[[2]]
ignored=dev.off()
include_graphics(var_explained_all_png)
```

# Output file 

```{r}
md5_tab = data.frame(
  File = c(output_hdf5, factors_file),
  MD5 = c(output_md5, factors_md5)
)
rownames(md5_tab) = NULL

md5_tab %>% 
  kable(booktabs = T) %>%
  kable_styling() 
```
